languages.text: "Ваша Светлость окажет нам услугу, ценность которой сложно исчислить — измерить в наградах и благодарностях". {n}Техножрец слегка кланяется.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "С благодарностью: Ваша Светлость окажет этой единице услугу, ценность которой сложно исчислить". {n}Техножрец слегка кланяется.{/n}

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} is granting us a boon whose value is difficult to calculate — to measure in rewards and gratitude." {n}The Tech-Priest bows slightly.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость окажет нам услугу, ценность которой сложно исчислить — измерить в наградах и благодарностях". {n}Техножрец слегка кланяется.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Jubilation: Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} is granting this unit a boon whose value is difficult to calculate." {n}The Tech-Priest bows slightly.{/n}
"Jubilation: Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} is granting this unit a boon whose value is difficult to calculate." {n}The Tech-Priest bows slightly.{/n}

"Jubilation: Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} is granting this unit a boon whose value is difficult to calculate." {n}The Tech-Priest bows slightly.{/n}

languages.text: 「歓喜：貴方様は、このユニットに価値を算定し難い恩恵を与えてくださる。」{n}テクプリストがわずかに頭を下げる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Jubilation: Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} is granting this unit a boon whose value is difficult to calculate." {n}The Tech-Priest bows slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「歓喜：貴方様は、このユニットに価値を算定し難い恩恵を与えてくださる。」{n}テクプリストがわずかに頭を下げる。{/n}

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri; bize değeri hesaplanması, ödül ve minnet olarak ölçmesi zor bir lütufta bulunmakta." {n}Tekno Rahip hafifçe eğiliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} is granting us a boon whose value is difficult to calculate — to measure in rewards and gratitude." {n}The Tech-Priest bows slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri; bize değeri hesaplanması, ödül ve minnet olarak ölçmesi zor bir lütufta bulunmakta." {n}Tekno Rahip hafifçe eğiliyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady} nos concede un gran honor cuyo valor elude todo intento de calcular la recompensa y la gratitud adecuadas». {n}El tecnosacerdote te dedica una ligera reverencia.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} is granting us a boon whose value is difficult to calculate — to measure in rewards and gratitude." {n}The Tech-Priest bows slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady} nos concede un gran honor cuyo valor elude todo intento de calcular la recompensa y la gratitud adecuadas». {n}El tecnosacerdote te dedica una ligera reverencia.{/n}

languages.text: “大人赐予了我们一项价值难以量化的恩惠，其意义已无法用报酬或感激之情来衡量。”{n}技术神甫微微鞠躬。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} is granting us a boon whose value is difficult to calculate — to measure in rewards and gratitude." {n}The Tech-Priest bows slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “大人赐予了我们一项价值难以量化的恩惠，其意义已无法用报酬或感激之情来衡量。”{n}技术神甫微微鞠躬。{/n}

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie accorde à cette unité une faveur dont la valeur est difficilement calculable... ou mesurable en termes de récompenses et de gratitude. » {n}Le technoprêtre s'incline légèrement.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} is granting us a boon whose value is difficult to calculate — to measure in rewards and gratitude." {n}The Tech-Priest bows slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie accorde à cette unité une faveur dont la valeur est difficilement calculable... ou mesurable en termes de récompenses et de gratitude. » {n}Le technoprêtre s'incline légèrement.{/n}

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} machen uns ein Geschenk, das hinsichtlich Belohnungen und Dankbarkeit schwer zu berechnen ist." {n}Der Techpriester verneigt sich.{/n}
